metadata.description: Governed, measurable multi-PR execution for agents — a dependency-ordered PR series, driven under a per-phase budget, gated, repaired, and integrated, with a structured per-spawn economy + gate summary.

plugins.name: convoy
plugins.description: `convoy_run` + `convoy_init` MCP tools that run a governed multi-PR series (implement -> gate -> repair -> integrate) and return a structured economy + gate summary. `convoy_run` spawns `claude -p` per PR, so run co-located with an authenticated Claude Code seat.
